case_title: BRUCE & NAOMI MANN TRUST VS. ALAN ZWEIG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BRUCE & NAOMI MANN TRUST DTD JUNE 27, 2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-14-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-04-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-14-2023 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUCE & NAOMI MANN TRUST DTD JUNE 27, 2019 AS TO DEFENDANT ZWEIG, ALAN ARCHITECTURAL FENESTRATION & RESTORATION. INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-02-2023 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-01-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-10-2023
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-23-2024 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2024 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: S. LE; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2023 CONTINUED TO OCT-04-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST BRUCE & NAOMI MANN TRUST FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-23-2024, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-08-2024. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
